title: Type-Safe Variant with Visitor Pattern
description: Implement a type-safe tagged union (variant) with compile-time checked visitor pattern using modern C++17 features.

complexity.time: O(1) access, O(n) visit where n = types

requirements: Store value in aligned storage for largest type
Implement visit(visitor) accepting callable with overloads
Implement get<T>() with exception on type mismatch
Implement get_if<T>() returning pointer or nullptr
Implement index() returning current type index
Properly handle destruction of active type

few_shot_examples.prompt: Calculate aligned storage for multiple types.
Get index of type in parameter pack.
